title: eriogonum compositum var. leianthum
intro: Eriogonum compositum var. leianthum, also known as Leianthus buckwheat, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Leianthus buckwheat contain flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Leianthus buckwheat can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been traditionally used to promote overall health and well-being.
